id.description: The unique identifier of the page.

status.description: The current status of the page.

spaceId.description: The ID of the space this page belongs to.

parentId.description: The ID of the parent page, if the page is nested.

parentType.description: The type of the parent (page or space).

position.description: The position of this page in the page tree relative to siblings.

authorId.description: The Atlassian account ID of the page author.

ownerId.description: The Atlassian account ID of the page owner.

lastOwnerId.description: The Atlassian account ID of the previous owner.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the page was created.
